hero-title: Let's get to know AI together.
hero-lede: Are you curious about AI but not sure where to begin? That's okay. You're in exactly the right place. We will go nice and slow. We won't use any confusing words. And we'll stay right beside you the whole way — from “wait, what is this thing?” all the way to feeling truly sure of yourself. You set the speed.

Curious about AI but not sure where to start? You're in the right place. We'll go slow, skip the confusing words, and stay with you from “what even is this?” to genuinely confident — at whatever pace feels right for you.
Curious but not sure where to start? You're in exactly the right place. We'll take it slow, skip the jargon, and walk with you from “what even is this?” to genuinely confident — at your own pace.
Curious but unsure where to start? You're in the right place. We skip the jargon and take you from “what is this?” to confident, at your pace.
From “what is this?” to confident. No jargon. Your pace.
reassure: You don't need to know anything about tech. And you don't have to understand it all at once — nobody does. This is a calm, gentle path that takes you from curious to confident, one small step at a time. Best of all, other people are walking the very same path right next to you.
You don't need a tech background, and you don't have to understand everything at once. This is a calm, gentle path from curious to confident — with other people walking it right beside you.
You don't need a tech background. You don't need to “get” everything at once. This is a calm, gentle path from curious to confident — with people walking it alongside you.
No tech background needed, and no need to grasp it all at once. A calm path from curious to confident — with others walking it too.
No tech background needed. A calm path from curious to confident — and you're not alone.
path-title: Just three gentle steps. Take them as slowly as you like.
Three gentle steps, taken at your own speed.
Three gentle steps. Go at your speed.
Three gentle steps, at your speed.
path-sub: You don't have to pick anything. Just begin at the top step. When you finish one step, the next one quietly opens up for you.
There's nothing to choose — just begin at the top. Each step quietly opens the next one for you.
No need to choose — just start at the top. Each step quietly opens the next.
No choosing needed — start at the top; each step opens the next.
Start at the top. Each step opens the next.
step1-desc: We'll start right at the beginning, with the basics explained the way a kind friend would explain them. Plain, everyday words. No rushing at all. Before long, “chatty” won't feel like a puzzle anymore. It'll feel like a tool you really understand and can use yourself.
We'll begin with the basics, explained the way a good friend would — plain words, no rush. Before long, “chatty” stops feeling like a mystery and starts feeling like a tool you really get.
Start with the basics, explained like a good friend would — plain words, no rush. Pretty soon “chatty” stops feeling like a mystery and starts feeling like a tool you actually get.
Begin with the basics in plain words, no rush. Soon “chatty” stops being a mystery and becomes a tool you actually get.
Basics in plain words. “Chatty” becomes a tool you get.
step2-title: Get good — and start making things of your own
step2-desc: The lessons are short and playful, and they really stick. You can poke at little picture-explainers, try real examples, and — when you feel ready — make a little agent of your own to use.
Short, playful lessons that stick, then put to use: poke at little explainers, try real examples, and make an agent of your own.
Short, playful lessons that genuinely stick — then put them to work: poke at little explainers, try real examples, and make an agent of your own.
Sticky, playful lessons — then apply them: poke explainers, try examples, build an agent of your own.
Sticky lessons, applied: interactive explainers, real examples, build your own agent.
step3-desc: Everything sticks better when you have company. So come and join other people who started in the very same spot you're in now. You can share what's working for you, cheer each other on, and figure the whole thing out together.
It all sticks better with company. Join others who started right where you are — sharing what works, cheering each other on, and figuring it out together.
It all sticks better with company. Join people who started exactly where you are — swapping what works, cheering each other on, figuring it out together.
It sticks better with company. Join people who started where you are — swapping what works and figuring it out together.
Learn with company. Join people figuring it out together.
stick-title: Our pages help you remember what you learn
Our pages remember what you learn
Our pages remember what you learn
Our pages remember what you learn
stick-desc: Here's the thing: most of what you read, you've forgotten by next week. That's just how brains work. So our lessons gently test you — a quick little question now, and then another one right before the idea would slip away. It's the real science of how memory works, but it's made to feel like a fun game. Give it a try below (don't worry, it only saves in your own browser):

Most of what you read, you forget by next week. So our lessons gently quiz you — a quick question now, then again right before it'd slip away. It's the science of memory, made to feel like a game. Have a go (it saves only in your browser):

Most things you read, you forget by next week. So our lessons gently quiz you — a quick prompt now, then again right before it'd slip away. It's the science of memory, made to feel like a game. Have a go (it saves only in your browser):
Most of what you read fades within a week. So our lessons quiz you — once now, then again just before it'd slip. It's memory science, made playful. Have a go (saved only in your browser):
Most reading fades in a week. We quiz you at the point of forgetting — spaced repetition, made playful. Try it (saved locally):
see-title: We show you exactly what's going on
We show you what's really happening
We show you what's actually happening
We show you what's actually happening
see-sub: AI can feel like pure magic — right up until you get to see the parts that make it work. So that's exactly what we do: we lay those parts out for you, side by side, where you can see them clearly.
AI feels like magic until you see the moving parts. So we lay them out for you — side by side, in plain view.
AI feels like magic until you see the moving parts. So we show them — side by side, in plain view.
AI feels like magic until you see the moving parts. We show them, side by side.
We show the moving parts, side by side.
demo-closer: That one tiny change — just telling it what you really have in mind — is the whole secret. And don't worry: we'll help you practise until it feels completely natural.
That tiny shift — telling it what you really mean — is the whole secret. And we'll help you make it second nature.
That tiny shift — telling it what you really mean — is the whole game. We'll make it second nature.
That tiny shift — saying what you really mean — is the whole game. We'll make it second nature.
Saying what you mean is the whole game. We make it second nature.
belong-desc: Everyone here felt a bit unsure when they began — that's completely normal. You'll get gentle, hype-free notes dropped into your inbox, and you can join a friendly community of like-minded people who are all getting comfortable with AI, together.
Everyone here started out a little unsure. Get gentle, no-hype notes in your inbox, and join a community of like minds getting comfortable with AI — together.
